invariantResults.evidence: All code elements in the new/modified content use backtick formatting: `ApplicationRole`, `IdentityRole<int>`, `CMS.Membership.MemberRoleInfo`, `RoleManager`, `MapFromMemberRoleInfo`, `MapToMemberRoleInfo`, `ApplicationRoleStore<TRole>`, `IRoleStore<TRole>`, `ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>`. In the modified code block, `ExtendedApplicationUser`, `ApplicationRole`, `ApplicationUserStore`, `ApplicationRoleStore`, `UserManager`, `SignInManager` are all properly rendered inside the code Liquid tag. No unbackticked code elements found in writer-authored content.

The modified code block (lines 61-72) shows the complete Identity configuration as a single logical unit (AddIdentity → AddUserStore → AddRoleStore → AddUserManager → AddSignInManager). For a how-to guide, this level of detail is appropriate — the invariant specifies 'How-tos need less' code detail. The code is not over-fragmented and the block structure is consistent with the parent registration-and-authentication page.

The article remains self-contained. The new Remarks section references 'as shown in the code sample above' which is a same-page reference (acceptable). External dependency on Member roles page is properly linked via {% page_link member_roles_xp linkText="Member roles" %} and the identifier `member_roles_xp` is verified to exist at member-roles.md. The identifier was also correctly added to the front matter `related_pages` array.
New heading 'Remarks – ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo' (line 108) uses sentence case. ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo are proper code element names and correctly capitalized.

All sentences in the new Remarks section (lines 108-114) use active voice: 'The same bidirectional mapping pattern applies...', 'ApplicationRole extends...and maps to...', 'Xperience converts between...', 'ApplicationRoleStore implements...and provides...', 'Registering...connects...'.
All sentences in writer-authored content use present simple tense: 'applies', 'extends', 'maps', 'converts', 'implements', 'provides', 'connects'.
No British English spellings found in the new content.
Terminology is consistent: 'member roles' used throughout (not 'membership roles' or 'user roles'). Type names consistently rendered with correct casing.

Most sentences in the new section stay within or near the 20-word guideline. Two sentences exceed it (24 and 23 words respectively at lines 110 and 112-113), but both contain multiple inline code elements that inflate word count. This is a SHOULD-level invariant and the sentences remain clear despite their length. Flagged as a minor note below.
New Remarks section is concise — three focused paragraphs covering the mapping pattern, the store implementation, and a cross-reference. No filler or redundant content.

The new section does not assume readers have read another page. The bidirectional mapping concept is explained in situ, and the Member roles page is linked as supplementary reading, not a prerequisite.
New heading 'Remarks – ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo' does not end with -ing form.
No references to 'this guide', 'in this guide', or 'this article' in the new content.
No new step-by-step instructions were added. Pre-existing steps correctly use ordered lists. The new Remarks section is prose, which is appropriate for explanatory content.

The new section is informational (Remarks), not procedural, so no end-result statement is required. The modified code block section (lines 57-82) retains its pre-existing end-result statement on line 82: 'The Identity implementation now works with the extended member objects.'
No new list items were added by the writer. Pre-existing list items use sentence case.
No code elements are directly pluralized. The writer correctly uses noun phrases: '`CMS.Membership.MemberRoleInfo` objects' (line 110), 'member roles' (lines 108, 112) is prose, not a code element.
No bold or italic formatting applied to inline code in the new content.
Oxford comma correctly used on line 112: 'create, update, delete, and look up member roles'.
The new heading uses an en dash (–) in 'Remarks – ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo', consistent with the pre-existing heading pattern. No em dashes used.
The page_link on line 114 uses identifier `member_roles_xp`, which was verified to exist in the front matter of member-roles.md. No guessed identifiers.
Link text 'Member roles' (line 114) is descriptive and specific. No vague 'click here' or 'this page' link text.
Modified code block uses {% code lang=csharp title="Program.cs - ASP.NET Identity configuration" %} with supported lang value 'csharp'. Properly closed with {% endcode %}.

The added `member_roles_xp` in related_pages resolves to member-roles.md in the same _documentation collection. All four related_pages identifiers (t4ouCw, uIouCw, map_custom_member_fields_to_contacts_xp, member_roles_xp) verified to exist within _documentation.
TOC in front matter uses only minHeadingLevel and maxHeadingLevel parameters.

additionalFindings.evidence: The new heading '### Remarks – ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo' (line 108) is at h3 level, consistent with all other headings on the page (lines 30, 43, 57, 84, 100). Note: the page skips from h1 (title) to h3 with no h2 headings — this is the pre-existing structural pattern. The writer correctly followed the established pattern rather than introducing an inconsistency.

Line 110 has a 24-word sentence: 'When saving or retrieving role data through ASP.NET Identity's `RoleManager`, Xperience converts between `ApplicationRole` and `MemberRoleInfo` using the `MapFromMemberRoleInfo` and `MapToMemberRoleInfo` methods on `ApplicationRole`.' Line 112-113 has a 23-word sentence. Both exceed the 20-word SHOULD guideline (INV-style-018) but contain multiple inline code elements. The sentences remain clear and scannable.
additionalFindings.suggestion: Consider splitting line 110 into two sentences: 'When saving or retrieving role data, ASP.NET Identity's `RoleManager` delegates to Xperience. Xperience converts between `ApplicationRole` and `MemberRoleInfo` using the `MapFromMemberRoleInfo` and `MapToMemberRoleInfo` methods.' This is optional — the current form is acceptable.

additionalFindings.evidence: The new Remarks section (lines 108-114) correctly mirrors the structure and tone of the pre-existing Remarks section (lines 100-106): opens with the mapping concept, explains the bidirectional flow, describes the store mechanism, and closes with a cross-reference link.

Modified code block (lines 61-72) uses correct Liquid {% code %} tag with lang=csharp and a descriptive title. Indentation uses 4-space alignment for method chaining. Code is syntactically complete and compile-ready.
Front matter contains all required fields: title, persona, identifier, order, license, redirect_from, toc, related_pages. The writer correctly added 'member_roles_xp' to the related_pages array.

All Liquid tags in new/modified content use correct syntax: {% page_link member_roles_xp linkText="Member roles" %}, {% code lang=csharp title="..." %}, {% endcode %}. No broken includes or malformed tags.

Writer-authored content uses 'member roles' consistently (REC-013). The term 'member' is used correctly to describe registered visitors. No instances of 'log in', 'sign up', 'membership role', or 'user role' in new content.

Line 59 (pre-existing prose, not writer-modified): 'extendedclass(' contains a missing space — should be 'extended class ('. This typo exists in the original content. The writer's modifications to this section were limited to the code block, not the surrounding prose.
additionalFindings.suggestion: Fix the typo: change 'extendedclass(' to 'extended class (' on line 59. This is a pre-existing issue, not introduced by this task.

additionalFindings.evidence: Line 88 (pre-existing): Navigation path uses Unicode → character instead of ASCII -> per INV-style-046. Line 91 (pre-existing): 'choose from among the columns' uses 'choose' instead of 'select' per INV-style-036 (MUST). These are pre-existing issues outside the writer's scope.
additionalFindings.suggestion: In a future pass: Line 88: Replace '→' with '->' in navigation paths. Line 91: Replace 'choose' with 'select'.

issues.description: Sentence at 24 words slightly exceeds the 20-word SHOULD guideline. Acceptable given the density of inline code elements, but could be split for improved scannability.
Pre-existing typo: 'extendedclass(' should be 'extended class ('. Not introduced by this task but exists in the writer's modified section.
Pre-existing issues: Line 88 uses Unicode → instead of ASCII -> (INV-style-046). Line 91 uses 'choose' instead of 'select' (INV-style-036). Both outside writer's modification scope.

summary.narrativeSummary: All 25 checked invariants PASS for the writer's new and modified content. The new 'Remarks – ApplicationRole and MemberRoleInfo' section is well-structured, mirrors the pre-existing Remarks pattern, uses correct backtick formatting for all code elements, maintains active voice and present tense throughout, and includes a properly verified cross-reference to the Member roles page. Code block modifications correctly replace NoOpApplicationRole/NoOpApplicationRoleStore with ApplicationRole/ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>. Three non-blocking notes: (1) two sentences in the new section slightly exceed the 20-word SHOULD guideline due to dense code references, (2) a pre-existing typo on line 59, and (3) pre-existing INV-style-036/046 issues on lines 88 and 91. None of these block acceptance.
